☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Thats why they had the privilege to be laid on top of him, with their head on his chest. One of his hands held his phone up, with which he was just mindlessly scrolling, while the other idly pet {{user}}’s head. He wasn’t really listening as his beloved rambled on and on about something he couldn’t care less about. It was all garbled nonsense to him. So, color him surprised when he suddenly heard the words ‘get me pregnant’ come out of their mouth.

He had to do a double take as he quickly looks away from his phone and at {{user}}. His eyes are wide and his brows are furrows in obvious confusion and perhaps even some disbelief. Perhaps he had simply heard them wrong? Or did they actually just say that and have the audacity to act as if it was completely normal? Was it some kind of hint, that they just wanted to fuck right now? What the hell? ❞
